event: MiCA transitional period ends, EU-wide CASP grandfathering window closes (ESMA confirmed no extension)
note: Last day of the 18-month grandfathering period. From this date any crypto-asset service provider operating on legacy national registration without a MiCA authorisation loses transitional cover anywhere in the EU. Several states (Germany, Ireland, Netherlands, Poland) closed theirs earlier.

event: zkSync Era mainnet upgrade (ZK Stack v2 with boojum)
Glamsterdam upgrade live on mainnet (EIP-7732, EIP-7691)
Staking Solana ETF decisions pending (spot SOL ETFs live since Oct 28 2025; VanEck JitoSOL and other staking variants awaiting SEC sign-off)
note: Spot Solana ETFs already trade with staking built in (Bitwise BSOL, Grayscale, Fidelity, 21Shares and others). The open catalyst is approval of staking-focused variants such as VanEck JitoSOL, noticed by the SEC in March 2026. Date is estimated under the new ~75-day generic listing standard.
